examples: Some of the traditional stories of neighborliness are impractical or silly and maybe just as well that our relations with our neighbors are changing.
Treaty of Good-Neighborliness and Friendly Cooperation between the People's Republic of China and the Russian federation.
The community-building and sense of neighborliness does come at a price.
And I think that at its core, tragedies like that at their core bring us as Americans together in our grief, and in our resolve, and in our neighborliness.
